rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-white
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-white

layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Control Room Protocol: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 with gap-4 or gap-6. Dense, tactical minimalism.
layout_and_spacing.landing_grid: Tetris Protocol: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Asymmetrical and breathable.
layout_and_spacing.container_padding: Generous spacing. Main sections use py-24. Cards use p-6 or p-8.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Subtle roundness. rounded-lg or rounded-xl maximum (8px to 12px) for structural elements. Buttons rounded-md.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background (#121212), 1px subtle border (border-white/10), no shadows. Crisp edges. On hover, slight lift and border color darkens/lightens.
surface_strategies.headers: Crystal Glass. bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl, 1px bottom border border-white/10.
surface_strategies.buttons: High contrast. Solid #00BCD4 for Primary, transparent with border-white/10 for Secondary. Trading buttons must use pure Buy/Sell colors with subtle internal glow.
surface_strategies.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay bg-gradient-to-b from-black/40 via-black/80 to-[#080808] to blend image perfectly into the page content.

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Lenis smooth scrolling is MANDATORY for the landing page.
motion_and_interactions.landing_animations: Framer Motion. Fade-in-up (y: 20, opacity: 0) for headings. Staggered children for feature cards.
motion_and_interactions.dashboard_animations: Minimalist micro-interactions. Instant feedback on Buy/Sell clicks with subtle scaling (scale: 0.98).
motion_and_interactions.tickers: react-fast-marquee for live crypto price feeds across the top header or hero bottom.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Always explicitly set text color on hover. Use focus-visible for accessibility.

image_urls.description: Dark abstract neon tech background to create a cinematic trading atmosphere.
Professional trader confidently viewing stock market charts, used for 'About' or 'Why Us' section.
Close up of Bitcoin and Ethereum coins on dark background, used for Crypto Deposit/Withdraw feature card.
Abstract blue radiating lines for AI predictions and real-time feeds feature card.
Detailed shot of Bitcoin/Ethereum for affiliate and tournament features.

components_to_use.charts: Recharts (Command: yarn add recharts) for real-time live trading charts. Ensure stroke widths are 2px and use neon brand/trading colors.
components_to_use.ui_library: Shadcn UI (Tabs, Dialog, DropdownMenu, Select). Do not use pure HTML tags for advanced interactions.

accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='buy-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Text over images must have drop-shadow or heavy overlay.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the Landing Page with Lenis scroll, Framer motion staggered reveals, and a dynamic marquee ticker for prices.
Build the Dashboard using a dense 'Control Room' grid (grid-cols-12 logic). Embed Recharts for the main trading area.
Apply #080808 to the main body and #121212 to cards. Use border-white/10 for subtle separation.
Ensure Buy (#00BFA5) and Sell (#E53935) buttons are highly prominent and have active press states.
Use the specific font classes: 'font-sans' (Outfit) for headings and 'font-mono' for prices/numbers.
Make the entire application mobile responsive. On mobile, stack dashboard widgets and convert sidebars to hamburger navigation.
